The Gambler (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $33,680,992Details
International Box Office $5,037,039
Worldwide Box Office $38,718,031
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,984,061
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,128,510
Total $5,112,571
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Jim Bennett is a college literature professor with a gambling addiction that is spiralling out of control.

Metrics

Legs:3.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:87.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $48,637,014

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 10th, 2014 (Limited) by Paramount Pictures
December 25th, 2014 (Expands Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: January 2nd, 2015 (Wide) (Spain)
January 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Mexico)
January 16th, 2015 (Wide) (Germany)
January 23rd, 2015 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
January 23rd, 2015 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: April 7th, 2015 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for language throughout, and for some sexuality/nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2348, 11/12/2014)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Geographical setting: Los Angeles
Plot point: Addiction, College Professor, Gambling, Loan Shark, Money Troubles, Non-Chronological
Subgenre: Crime Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Chartoff Winkler Productions, Closest to the Hole, Leverage
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
